# SpeciesNet Studio — Sponsor Tiers

Thank you for considering supporting SpeciesNet Studio. This is an independent open-source project maintained in personal time. Sponsorship directly funds maintenance hours, faster issue response, and new features for the conservation-tech community.

Sponsor at [github.com/sponsors/arunrajiah](https://github.com/sponsors/arunrajiah).

---

## Monthly tiers

### Individual Supporter — $5 / month
Your name listed in the README supporters section.

*Funds: ~1 hour/month of maintenance and issue triage.*

---

### Individual Sustainer — $25 / month
Everything above, plus priority issue response (acknowledged within 48 hours, not just triaged).

*Funds: ~4 hours/month of active development — typically one bug fix or small improvement per month.*

---

### Lab / Small Program — $100 / month
Everything above, plus:
- Your lab or program logo linked in the README
- A monthly email update on the roadmap and upcoming features

*Funds: ~16 hours/month — enough to maintain the project, respond to all issues, and ship one new feature or model adapter per month.*

---

### Conservation Program — $500 / month
Everything above, plus:
- A quarterly 30-minute call to discuss your program's specific workflow needs
- Named credit in the release notes of any feature your feedback directly influenced

*Funds: ~80 hours/month — enough to treat SpeciesNet Studio as a part-time project: dedicated time for new adapters, export formats, and researcher-requested features.*

---

### Foundation / Institutional — $2 000+ / month
Everything above, plus:
- A line item on the project homepage explicitly thanking your foundation
- Input into the annual roadmap priorities — your use cases get first consideration when planning major features

*Funds: enough to make SpeciesNet Studio a sustained, full-time-equivalent effort, including documentation, accessibility work, and proactive outreach to the camera-trap research community.*

---

## One-time contributions

| Amount | Recognition |
|--------|-------------|
| $50 | Listed as a past supporter in docs/supporters.md |
| $250 | Listed as a past supporter + named thanks in the next release note |
| $1 000 | Listed as a past supporter + named thanks + your use case may be prioritised in the next major release |

---

## What your sponsorship will never do

- Fund closed-source features or a paid tier
- Change the Apache 2.0 license
- Gate existing functionality behind a paywall

SpeciesNet Studio will remain fully open source. Sponsorship funds time, not access.

---

## Questions?

Open an issue or email the maintainer (address in the GitHub profile). Conservation organisations and research foundations are welcome to reach out about custom arrangements, including invoiced support contracts.
